summary: New internal/normalize package: per-Actor dataset-item schema unification. Loads embedded YAML profiles (profiles/*.yaml) for the top newsletter-relevant Actors (apidojo/tweet-scraper, apidojo/twitter-scraper-lite, trudax/reddit-scraper, apify/google-news-scraper, apify/hacker-news-scraper, apify/youtube-scraper, apify/instagram-scraper, apify/smart-article-extractor) plus a default fallback. Each profile maps raw item fields to a unified Item shape (url, title, body, author, published_at, engagement_score, source_actor, hash). Hash is SHA-256 over URL (or raw JSON when no URL) and powers --only-new dedupe. User overrides load from ~/.apify-pp/profiles/.
rationale: Every Apify Actor emits a different item shape; cross-Actor search, novelty diffing, and digest rendering all require one canonical schema. The generator produces per-endpoint typed commands but no normalization layer.
